revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 16 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 16 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月16日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛仁]]2年（[[1018年]]_月_日） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[妍子]]が皇太后に、[[威子]]が[[御一条天皇]]の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]]2年（[[1279年]]_月_日） - 阿仏尼が『[[十六夜日記]]』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]]元年（[[1321年]]_月_日） - [[後醍醐天皇]]が[[建武新政]]を始める
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]11年（[[1840年]][[11月9日]]） - [[黒田清隆]]、2代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1900年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[669年]]_月_日） - [[中臣鎌足]]（藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]]の祖（* [[614年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月15日 (旧暦)|10月15日]] 翌日[[10月17日 (旧暦)|10月17日]] - 前月[[9月16日 (旧暦)|9月16日]] 翌月[[11月16日 (旧暦)|11月16日]] *新暦[[10月16日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 忌日 == * [[天智天皇]]8年（ユリウス暦[[669年]][[11月14日]]） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]（藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]]の祖（* [[614年]]） * [[元禄]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1700年]][[11月26日]]） - [[徳川光友]]、第2代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1625年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月21日]]） - [[松平義当]]、[[高須藩]]主（* [[1738年]]）

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月16日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛仁]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1018年]][[11月26日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]]が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]]が[[後一条天皇]]の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1279年]][[11月21日]]） - [[阿仏尼]]が『[[十六夜日記]]』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1321年]][[11月6日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]が[[建武の新政]]を始める
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1819年]][[12月3日]]） - [[阿部正弘]]、[[幕末]]の[[老中]]、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]]主（+ [[1857年]]） * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[11月9日]]） - [[黒田清隆]]、2代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1900年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天智天皇]]8年（ユリウス暦[[669年]][[11月14日]]） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]（藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]]の祖（* [[614年]]） * [[元禄]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1700年]][[11月26日]]） - [[徳川光友]]、第2代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1625年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月21日]]） - [[松平義当]]、[[高須藩]]主（* [[1738年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days

revision.text:
'''October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 16'''<!--Lunar October16--> is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛仁]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1018年]][[11月26日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]]が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]]が[[後一条天皇]]の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1279年]][[11月21日]]） - [[阿仏尼]]が『[[十六夜日記]]』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1321年]][[11月6日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]が[[建武の新政]]を始める
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1819年]][[12月3日]]） - [[阿部正弘]]、[[幕末]]の[[老中]]、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]]主（+ [[1857年]]） * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[11月9日]]） - [[黒田清隆]]、2代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1900年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天智天皇]]8年（ユリウス暦[[669年]][[11月14日]]） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]（藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]]の祖（* [[614年]]） * [[元禄]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1700年]][[11月26日]]） - [[徳川光友]]、第2代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1625年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月21日]]） - [[松平義当]]、[[高須藩]]主（* [[1738年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先勝]]

'''October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 16'''<!--Lunar October16--> is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛仁]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1018年]][[11月26日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]]が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]]が[[後一条天皇]]の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1279年]][[11月21日]]） - [[阿仏尼]]が『[[十六夜日記]]』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1321年]][[11月6日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]が[[建武の新政]]を始める
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1819年]][[12月3日]]） - [[阿部正弘]]、[[幕末]]の[[老中]]、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]]主（+ [[1857年]]） * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[11月9日]]） - [[黒田清隆]]、2代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1900年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天智天皇]]8年（ユリウス暦[[669年]][[11月14日]]） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]（藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]]の祖（* [[614年]]） * [[元禄]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1700年]][[11月26日]]） - [[徳川光友]]、第2代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1625年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月21日]]） - [[松平義当]]、[[高須藩]]主（* [[1738年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

--> == Events == * [[寛仁]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1018年]][[11月26日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]]が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]]が[[後一条天皇]]の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1279年]][[11月21日]]） - [[阿仏尼]]が『[[十六夜日記]]』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1321年]][[11月6日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]が[[建武の新政]]を始める
== Births == * [[文政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1819年]][[12月3日]]） - [[阿部正弘]]、[[幕末]]の[[老中]]、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]]主（+ [[1857年]]） * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[11月9日]]） - [[黒田清隆]]、2代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1900年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]]8年（ユリウス暦[[669年]][[11月14日]]） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]（藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]]の祖（* [[614年]]） * [[元禄]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1700年]][[11月26日]]） - [[徳川光友]]、第2代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1625年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月21日]]） - [[松平義当]]、[[高須藩]]主（* [[1738年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[寛仁]]2年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1018]][[11月26日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]]が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]]が[[後一条天皇]]の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1279]][[11月21日]]） - [[阿仏尼]]が『[[十六夜日記]]』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1321]][[11月6日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]が[[建武の新政]]を始める

[[sn:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[寛仁]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1018]][[11月26日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]]が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]]が[[後一条天皇]]の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[1279]][[11月21日]]） - [[阿仏尼]]が『[[十六夜日記]]』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1321]][[11月6日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]が[[建武の新政]]を始める
== Births == * [[文政]]2nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1819]][[12月3日]]） - [[阿部正弘]]、[[幕末]]の[[老中]]、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]]主（+ [[1857]]） * [[天保]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1840]][[11月9日]]） - [[黒田清隆]]、2代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1900]]）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]]8th year（ユリウス暦[[669]][[11月14日]]） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]（藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]]の祖（* [[614]]） * [[元禄]]13rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1700]][[11月26日]]） - [[徳川光友]]、第2代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1625]]） * [[享和]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1801]][[11月21日]]） - [[松平義当]]、[[高須藩]]主（* [[1738]]）

revision.comment: translating this common phrase in them
revision.text:
[[sn:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[寛仁]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1018]][[11月26日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]]が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]]が[[後一条天皇]]の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1279]][[11月21日]]） - [[阿仏尼]]が『[[十六夜日記]]』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1321]][[11月6日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]が[[建武の新政]]を始める
== Births == * [[文政]]2nd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1819]][[12月3日]]） - [[阿部正弘]]、[[幕末]]の[[老中]]、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]]主（+ [[1857]]） * [[天保]]11th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1840]][[11月9日]]） - [[黒田清隆]]、2代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1900]]）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]]8th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[669]][[11月14日]]） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]（藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]]の祖（* [[614]]） * [[元禄]]13rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1700]][[11月26日]]） - [[徳川光友]]、第2代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1625]]） * [[享和]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1801]][[11月21日]]） - [[松平義当]]、[[高須藩]]主（* [[1738]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

[[sn:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[11月26日]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[11月21日]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[11月6日]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[12月3日]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[老中]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[11月9日]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[11月14日]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[11月26日]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[11月21日]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）

revision.comment: doing mass replacement for all western dates to english
revision.text:
[[sn:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[老中]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

[[sn:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[老中]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[老中]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[内閣総理大臣]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "内閣総理大臣" to "Prime Minister of Japan"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵== See Also ==" to "== See Also =="
revision.text:
[[sn:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）== See Also ==

[[sn:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ） == See Also ==

[[sn:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[zh:十月十六]] [[en:draft:October 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kannin|ja|寛仁}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1018]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]] が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]] が[[後一条天皇]] の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1279]] [[November 21]] ） - [[阿仏尼]] が『[[十六夜日記]] 』の旅に出発 * [[Genkō (1321–1324)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1321]] [[November 6]] ） - [[後醍醐天皇]] が[[建武の新政]] を始める
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1819]] [[December 3]] ） - [[阿部正弘]] 、[[幕末]] の[[Rōjū]] 、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]] 主（+ [[1857]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1840]] [[November 9]] ） - [[黒田清隆]] 、2代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] （+ [[1900]] ）
== Deaths == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 14]] ） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] （藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]] の祖（* [[614]] ） * [[Genroku]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1700]] [[November 26]] ） - [[徳川光友]] 、第2代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1625]] ） * [[享和]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1801]] [[November 21]] ） - [[松平義当]] 、[[高須藩]] 主（* [[1738]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and the day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Kannin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1018]] – November 26): Fujiwara no Michinaga’s daughter, Yaneko, became Empress Dowager, and her sister, Takeko, was installed as the consort (chūgū) of Emperor Go-Ichijō. During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1279]] – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1321]] – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1819]] – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1840]] – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).
== Deaths == * In the 8th year of the Tenchi era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[669]] – November 14): Emperor Tenji’s trusted retainer, known as Nakatomi no Kamatari (also referred to as Fujiwara no Kamatari), a founding ancestor of the Fujiwara clan, died (born 614). * In the 13th year of the Genroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1700]] – November 26): Tokugawa Mitsutomo, the 2nd lord of the Owari Domain, died (born 1625). * In the 1st year of the Kyōwa era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1801]] – November 21): Matsudaira Yoshitō, the lord of the Takasu Domain, died (born 1738).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]]

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, and the day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Kannin era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1018]] – November 26): Fujiwara no Michinaga’s daughter, Yaneko, became Empress Dowager, and her sister, Takeko, was installed as the consort (chūgū) of Emperor Go-Ichijō. During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1279]] – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1321]] – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1819]] – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1840]] – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).
== Deaths == * In the 8th year of the Tenchi era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[669]] – November 14): Emperor Tenji’s trusted retainer, known as Nakatomi no Kamatari (also referred to as Fujiwara no Kamatari), a founding ancestor of the Fujiwara clan, died (born 614). * In the 13th year of the Genroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1700]] – November 26): Tokugawa Mitsutomo, the 2nd lord of the Owari Domain, died (born 1625). * In the 1st year of the Kyōwa era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1801]] – November 21): Matsudaira Yoshitō, the lord of the Takasu Domain, died (born 1738).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十六]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月16日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛仁]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1018年]][[11月26日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原妍子|妍子]]が皇太后に、[[藤原威子|威子]]が[[後一条天皇]]の中宮になる。道長は「此世をば我世とぞ思ふ望月の欠けたる事もなしと思へば」と自らの繁栄を詠む * [[弘安]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1279年]][[11月21日]]） - [[阿仏尼]]が『[[十六夜日記]]』の旅に出発 * [[元亨]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1321年]][[11月6日]]） - [[後醍醐天皇]]が[[建武の新政]]を始める
== 誕生日 == * [[文政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1819年]][[12月3日]]） - [[阿部正弘]]、[[幕末]]の[[老中]]、[[備後福山藩|福山藩]]主（+ [[1857年]]） * [[天保]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1840年]][[11月9日]]） - [[黒田清隆]]、2代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1900年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天智天皇]]8年（ユリウス暦[[669年]][[11月14日]]） - [[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]（藤原鎌足）、豪族・[[藤原氏]]の祖（* [[614年]]） * [[元禄]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1700年]][[11月26日]]） - [[徳川光友]]、第2代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1625年]]） * [[享和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1801年]][[11月21日]]） - [[松平義当]]、[[高須藩]]主（* [[1738年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十六]][[zh:十月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840421]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 16|qq=October 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Kannin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1018|1018]] – November 26): Fujiwara no Michinaga’s daughter, Yaneko, became Empress Dowager, and her sister, Takeko, was installed as the consort (chūgū) of Emperor Go-Ichijō. During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1279|1279]] – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1321|1321]] – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).
== Deaths == * In the 8th year of the Tenchi era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] – November 14): Emperor Tenji’s trusted retainer, known as Nakatomi no Kamatari (also referred to as Fujiwara no Kamatari), a founding ancestor of the Fujiwara clan, died (born 614). * In the 13th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1700|1700]] – November 26): Tokugawa Mitsutomo, the 2nd lord of the Owari Domain, died (born 1625). * In the 1st year of the Kyōwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1801|1801]] – November 21): Matsudaira Yoshitō, the lord of the Takasu Domain, died (born 1738).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|15|10|17|9|16|11|10|1016|qq=}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1279|1279]] – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1321|1321]] – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Kannin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1018|1018]] – November 26): Fujiwara no Michinaga’s daughter, Yaneko, became Empress Dowager, and her sister, Takeko, was installed as the consort (chūgū) of Emperor Go-Ichijō. During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1279|1279]] – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1321|1321]] – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).
== Deaths == * In the 8th year of the Tenchi era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] – November 14): Emperor Tenji’s trusted retainer, known as Nakatomi no Kamatari (also referred to as Fujiwara no Kamatari), a founding ancestor of the Fujiwara clan, died (born 614). * In the 13th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1700|1700]] – November 26): Tokugawa Mitsutomo, the 2nd lord of the Owari Domain, died (born 1625). * In the 1st year of the Kyōwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1801|1801]] – November 21): Matsudaira Yoshitō, the lord of the Takasu Domain, died (born 1738).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Kannin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1018|1018]] – November 26): Fujiwara no Michinaga’s daughter, Yaneko, became Empress Dowager, and her sister, Takeko, was installed as the consort (chūgū) of Emperor Go-Ichijō. During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1279|1279]] – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1321|1321]] – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).
== Deaths == * In the 8th year of the Tenchi era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] – November 14): Emperor Tenji’s trusted retainer, known as Nakatomi no Kamatari (also referred to as Fujiwara no Kamatari), a founding ancestor of the Fujiwara clan, died (born 614). * In the 13th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1700|1700]] – November 26): Tokugawa Mitsutomo, the 2nd lord of the Owari Domain, died (born 1625). * In the 1st year of the Kyōwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1801|1801]] – November 21): Matsudaira Yoshitō, the lord of the Takasu Domain, died (born 1738).

== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Kannin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1018|1018]] – November 26): Fujiwara no Michinaga’s daughter, Yaneko, became Empress Dowager, and her sister, Takeko, was installed as the consort (chūgū) of Emperor Go-Ichijō. During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1279|1279]] – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1321|1321]] – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).
== Deaths == * In the 8th year of the Tenchi era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] – November 14): Emperor Tenji’s trusted retainer, known as Nakatomi no Kamatari (also referred to as Fujiwara no Kamatari), a founding ancestor of the Fujiwara clan, died (born 614). * In the 13th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1700|1700]] – November 26): Tokugawa Mitsutomo, the 2nd lord of the Owari Domain, died (born 1625). * In the 1st year of the Kyōwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1801|1801]] – November 21): Matsudaira Yoshitō, the lord of the Takasu Domain, died (born 1738).

During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1279|1279]] – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1321|1321]] – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).
== Deaths == * In the 8th year of the Tenchi era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] – November 14): Emperor Tenji’s trusted retainer, known as Nakatomi no Kamatari (also referred to as Fujiwara no Kamatari), a founding ancestor of the Fujiwara clan, died (born 614). * In the 13th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1700|1700]] – November 26): Tokugawa Mitsutomo, the 2nd lord of the Owari Domain, died (born 1625). * In the 1st year of the Kyōwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1801|1801]] – November 21): Matsudaira Yoshitō, the lord of the Takasu Domain, died (born 1738).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Kannin era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1018|1018]] – November 26): Fujiwara no Michinaga’s daughter, Yaneko, became Empress Dowager, and her sister, Takeko, was installed as the consort (chūgū) of Emperor Go-Ichijō. During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1279|1279]] – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1321|1321]] – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1819|1819]] – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1840|1840]] – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).
== Deaths == * In the 8th year of the Tenchi era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] – November 14): Emperor Tenji’s trusted retainer, known as Nakatomi no Kamatari (also referred to as Fujiwara no Kamatari), a founding ancestor of the Fujiwara clan, died (born 614). * In the 13th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1700|1700]] – November 26): Tokugawa Mitsutomo, the 2nd lord of the Owari Domain, died (born 1625). * In the 1st year of the Kyōwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1801|1801]] – November 21): Matsudaira Yoshitō, the lord of the Takasu Domain, died (born 1738).

During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1279|en|1279|WD=Q5534|lt=1279}} – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1321|en|1321|WD=Q5769|lt=1321}} – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."

During this time, Michinaga himself composed a poem celebrating his own prosperity: “I regard this world as my world, and I see no defect in the waning moon.” * In the 2nd year of the Kōan era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1279|en|1279|WD=Q5534|lt=1279|1=1279}} – November 21): Abutsu-ni set out on a journey, as recorded in her "Diary of the Sixteenth Night." * In the 1st year of the Genkō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1321|en|1321|WD=Q5769|lt=1321|1=1321}} – November 6): Emperor Go-Daigo initiated his new government policy known as "Kenmu no Shinsei."
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819|1=1819}} – December 3): Abe Masahiro, a senior councilor (Rōjū) of the Bakumatsu period and lord of the Fukuyama Domain, was born (died 1857). * In the 11th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|WD=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} – November 9): Kuroda Kiyotaka, who later served as the 2nd Prime Minister of Japan, was born (died 1900).
== Deaths == * In the 8th year of the Tenchi era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|669|en|669|WD=Q31115|lt=669|1=669}} – November 14): Emperor Tenji’s trusted retainer, known as Nakatomi no Kamatari (also referred to as Fujiwara no Kamatari), a founding ancestor of the Fujiwara clan, died (born 614). * In the 13th year of the Genroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1700|en|1700|WD=Q6813|lt=1700|1=1700}} – November 26): Tokugawa Mitsutomo, the 2nd lord of the Owari Domain, died (born 1625). * In the 1st year of the Kyōwa era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}} – November 21): Matsudaira Yoshitō, the lord of the Takasu Domain, died (born 1738).
